name: Stunning Snare
description:
You rig a snare to disorient a creature with a quick bash, leaving it with little ability to defend itself. The trap deals ] damage to the first creature to enter its square; that creature must attempt a save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and is for 1 round and Stunned 1.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is off-guard for 1 round and Stunned 2.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is off-guard for 1 minute and Stunned 4.
